zh.Thornton-le-Moors, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾桑頓 勒 波斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Thornton於1316年出生在英國爾桑頓 馬福時，她的父親Peter Thorton30歲，母親Lucia Hellesby21歲。她於1334年與Sir Thomas Dutton在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1379年之前在英國英格蘭爾達頓。

zh-hans.Thornton-le-Moors, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾桑頓 勒 波斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Thornton于1316年出生在英国爾桑頓 馬福时，她的父亲Peter Thorton30岁，母亲Lucia Hellesby21岁。她于1334年与Sir Thomas Dutton在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1379年之前在英国英格兰爾達頓。

nameMeanings.name: Thornton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of numerous places throughout England and Scotland so called, from Old English thorn ‘thorn tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The placename is most frequent in northern England, especially Yorkshire, where there are at least 16 possible sources for the surname.
Irish: Anglicized (translated) form of Gaelic Mac Sceacháin ‘son of Sceachán’ (see Skehan ).
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Draighneáin ‘descendant of Draighneán’ (see Drennan ).

variants.name: Thornber
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the five minor places in Yorkshire called Thornber, particularly Thornber in Halton West. The placenames derive from Old English thorn ‘thorn’ + beorg ‘hill, mound’.
Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’; compare   Thornton  .

variants.name: Thorton
meanings: English: probably a shortened form of   Thornton  , or a habitational name from Thorton in Marnhull, Dorset, which has the same origin.

variants.name: Skehan
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Sceacháin or Ó Sceacháin ‘son (or descendant) of Sceachán’, a personal name probably based on a diminutive of sceach ‘briar, thorn bush’. The Gaelic name has sometimes been ‘translated’ as Thornton .

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Thornton was born in 1316, in Thornton Mayow, Cheshire, England, her father, Peter Thorton, was 30 and her mother, Lucia Hellesby, was 21. She married Sir Thomas Dutton in 1334, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died before 1379, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Thornton est née en 1316, à Thornton Mayow, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Peter Thorton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lucia Hellesby, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Dutton en 1334, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1379, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Thornton-le-Moors, Cheshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 토른턴 일 무르스
ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Thornton(이)가 1316년 영국 체실르 토른턴 메이요에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter Thorton(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucia Hellesby(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1334년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Sir Thomas Dutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1379년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 드턴에서 사망했다.

ru.Thornton-le-Moors, Cheshire, England: таурнтон л мурс, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Thornton родилась в 1316 г. в местности таурнтон меиоу, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Peter Thorton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucia Hellesby, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Dutton в 1334 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 1379 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
